words.example: Her insight helped the team find the real problem.

words.meaning: the ability to do something well
words.example: Her competence in planning made the event successful.

words.meaning: the ability to make sensible decisions
words.example: Good judgment is important when news spreads quickly.

words.meaning: special skill or knowledge in an area
words.example: The project needs expertise in design and finance.
Interviewing is a useful skill for many jobs.

words.meaning: one part or feature of a situation
words.example: One aspect of the plan is still unclear.

words.meaning: a basic structure for ideas or work
words.example: The report gives a framework for comparing schools.
Test scores are only one benchmark of progress.

words.meaning: a person’s view of the future
words.example: The economic outlook is better than last year.

words.meaning: a position or way of thinking about something
words.example: From a parent’s standpoint, safety comes first.
